payload.answer: Committed durable memories: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Sam is open to catching up about AI infrastructure and wants Daniele to send the article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript identifies Sam as the memory subject and provides updated employment and preference information, but no existing entity ID is supplied.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is interested in catching up with Daniele about AI infrastructure and asked Daniele to send an article.

details: Employment update committed as current: Point72; Goldman treated as former employer.
Music preference committed with recency qualifier for early Coltrane.
AI infrastructure catch-up noted as a conversational interest/action context, not a permanent strong preference.
